title: ruyschiana palmata
intro: Ruyschiana palmata, also known as the palmate-leafed Ruis or Dwarf Ruis, is a flowering plant species within the gentian family, Gentianaceae. It is a perennial plant native to Europe, used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbalism. The plant contains iridoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be used to make a tea, which is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
